legacy.description:
Curator & Collector.
BlackBlocks is a curatorial project in the field of NFT Art. Our goal is to introduce & present the works of NFT Artists.
legacy.name: BlackBlocs

legacy.full_text:
🟠 Shill Post 🟠

@BlackBlocs_ is looking for you & your NFT artwork.

Plz share your artwork, as follows:
1_ Theme: Delicious
2_ Foundation, OpenSea, objkt, Exchange Art, etc
3_ Tag 2 friends
4_ Like, Repost, and Follow => @BlackBlocs_ 

#nft #nftshill #nftcollector #art https://t.co/cjdpggYRwW

media.ext_alt_text: The love between swans is beautiful and deeply moving. When the time comes for them, they return to the place where they first met their true love, and there, they gently fade away in the embrace of the sea. This is the final, beautiful scene of the lover swan.
